jobs.name: Morning Email Digest
jobs.instruction:
Read these emails carefully. Identify the 3 most important ones requiring action today. For each, write: subject, sender, what action is needed, and by when. Then list FYI emails briefly.
and also summarize all of my other details as  well and send me a summary for my day ahead.

history.summary:
Here’s your actionable summary for today:

---

**Top 3 Emails Requiring Action Today:**

1. Subject: Brave Search API login attempt
   Sender: Brave Search API <search-api@brave.com>
   Action Needed: Complete the sign-in process using the verification code 731437. This expires in 15 minutes, so act immediately.

2. Subject: Report: Daily Margin Statement | 19-03-2026
   Sender: Groww <noreply@groww.in>
   Action Needed: Review the attached daily margin statement for your stock trades. Verify accuracy and address any discrepancies. Due today.

3. Subject: Joel, your application was sent to Ta
